title: conyza candicans
intro: Conyza candicans, also known as Fleabane, is an annual or perennial herbaceous plant in the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been used to alleviate symptoms of digestive problems, colds, and respiratory issues, and is also known to have antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. Conyza candicans can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its benefits.
